text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, April 28. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds critical. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that updating our financial spreadsheets. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Smart financial planning. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 5th grade level now. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Good focus area. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Updating our financial spreadsheets. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
